title: geofencing — health probes
description: Registered via GeofencingHealthProvider. Emitted through Spatie Health as the module-wide aggregate + four sub-probes.

probes.name: geofencing-postgis-available
probes.description: PostGIS extension loaded on the current Postgres connection. Non-Postgres drivers (SQLite in tests) skip.

probes.name: geofencing-checks-writable
probes.description: geofence_checks table exists + accepts writes. Round-trips a sentinel row insert-then-delete.

probes.name: geofencing-recent-activity
probes.description: At least one evaluation in the last 60 minutes for any tenant. Silence detection.

probes.name: geofencing-override-rate
probes.description: Override rate < 5% of evaluations over the trailing hour. Spike detection.

probes.name: geofencing-aggregate
probes.description: Module-wide aggregate. Green when postgis + writable checks are green.
